canonicalSpecs.purpose: OpenAPI source-of-truth, app/backend surface, path, tag, operationId, error, auth, and version rules.
SDK generation manifest, generated output, resource-style client surface, auth headers, and SDK verification rules.
Local component specs directory and sdk-family manifest rules.
README and generated SDK example documentation rules.
Executable API, SDK, generated output, and documentation verification rules.
Canonical domain ownership and iam/platform/intelligence naming rules.

integration.authority: OpenAPI documents under sdks/specs/openapi are the SDK source of truth and must follow API_SPEC.md.
integration.dependencyPolicy: Consumers integrate through generated SDK package exports or injected service facades; raw HTTP, manual token headers, local DTO forks, and hand-edited generated output are forbidden.
integration.sdkPolicy: Generation uses --standard-profile sdkwork-v3 and exposes resource-oriented clients derived from OpenAPI tags and dotted operationIds.
integration.iamPolicy: IAM and auth capabilities use the canonical iam/auth API domains and Sdkwork-Access-Token handling; identity naming is not allowed.
